channel.title: Alex Kim — Blog
channel.description: Writing about design, development, and the craft of building things.

item.title: Why I Rewrote My Site in Astro
item.description: A frank look at the tradeoffs of choosing a framework — and why static-first finally won me over.

item.title: On Learning in Public
item.description: Why sharing your half-formed ideas is braver and more useful than waiting until you're ready.

item.title: The Beauty of Constraint-Driven Design
item.description: How working within tight constraints often produces the most elegant and memorable solutions.
